mapper.select: /* osstCallMapper.getNpReqInfo */ SELECT DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, 'MNP3', B.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || B.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || B.MOVE_MOBILE_RN) AS npTlphNo , B.MOVE_COMPANY AS moveCompany , A.CSTMR_TYPE AS cstmrType , C.SELF_CERT_TYPE AS selfCertType , C.CSTMR_NAME AS cstmrName , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(TRIM(C.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN)) AS custIdntNo , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(TRIM(C.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN)) AS crprNo , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID AS cntpntShopId FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP B , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP C WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* osstCallMapper.isOrgChk */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP3001' AND CD_VAL = (SELECT CNTPNT_SHOP_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}) AND USG_YN = 'Y'
/* osstCallMapper.getKnoteKtOrgId */ SELECT KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} AND ROWNUM = 1
